## 📝 Summary
Describe what this PR accomplishes.

## 🔗 Related Issue
Closes #ISSUE_NUMBER or Relates to #ISSUE_NUMBER

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Specification clarification
- [ ] Registry addition
- [ ] Architecture change
- [ ] Other

## ✅ Alignment Checklist
- [ ] Follows the Constitution
- [ ] Respects ADRs 001-005
- [ ] Doesn't redefine official concepts
- [ ] Maintains backward compatibility
- [ ] All related documents updated
- [ ] Follows Publication Style Guide
- [ ] Uses official identifiers from registries
- [ ] Canonical semantic definitions remain unchanged unless introducing a new concept

## 📊 Compatibility Impact
- [ ] Fully backward compatible
- [ ] Requires deprecation period
- [ ] Breaking change

## 📚 Documentation
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated
- [ ] README updated (if needed)
- [ ] Specifications updated
- [ ] Style guide followed

## 📝 Checklist
- [ ] Read CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Read Constitution and ADRs
- [ ] Updated all related documents
- [ ] Linked related issues
- [ ] Clear PR title and description
